summary: Complete testing of 3 new features for TopBass: 1) Location-based services/geolocation, 2) CSV import for bulk handyman onboarding, 3) Analytics dashboard. Backend: 100% (23/23 tests passed). Frontend: All features verified and working. FIXED: Route ordering bug in /api/handymen/nearby endpoint.

ui_bugs.component: Analytics - Bookings by Status Pie Chart
ui_bugs.issue: Pie chart appears small/compressed in the container, labels visible but chart area may need sizing adjustment

passed_tests: GET /api/districts/nearby?district=Colombo&radius=80 - returns nearby districts with correct distances
GET /api/districts/nearby?district=Kandy&radius=100 - returns Matale and other nearby districts
GET /api/districts/nearby with invalid district - returns empty list
GET /api/handymen/nearby?district=Colombo - returns handymen sorted by proximity with distance_km
GET /api/handymen/nearby?district=Colombo&service=plumber - filters by service correctly
GET /api/handymen/nearby handymen sorted by distance ascending
GET /api/handymen/nearby?district=Colombo&radius=50 - custom radius works
GET /api/admin/csv-template - returns CSV with all required columns
POST /api/admin/csv-import - valid CSV creates handymen successfully
POST /api/admin/csv-import - duplicate email skipped with error message
POST /api/admin/csv-import - missing required fields skipped
POST /api/admin/csv-import - non-CSV file rejected with 400
POST /api/admin/csv-import - requires admin authentication
GET /api/admin/analytics - returns expected data structure
GET /api/admin/analytics - bookings_by_status contains status counts
GET /api/admin/analytics - bookings_daily has date, count, revenue
GET /api/admin/analytics - top_services shows service_id and bookings
GET /api/admin/analytics - top_handymen shows full_name and user_id
GET /api/admin/analytics - user_growth shows role breakdown by date
GET /api/admin/analytics - bookings_by_district shows district counts
GET /api/admin/analytics - revenue_summary includes total_revenue, platform_fee, transactions
GET /api/admin/analytics - totals includes users, handymen, bookings, reviews
GET /api/admin/analytics - requires admin authentication
UI: HomePage district filter shows nearby section when district selected
UI: HomePage nearby section displays handymen with distance (0 km for same district)
UI: ServiceListPage nearby toggle hidden when no district selected
UI: ServiceListPage nearby toggle appears when district selected
UI: ServiceListPage 'Show Nearby' toggles to 'Nearby Mode ON'
UI: ServiceListPage handymen show distance_km when nearby mode on
UI: Admin Dashboard Overview tab loads with stats
UI: Admin Dashboard CSV Import tab shows file input, download template, import button
UI: Admin Dashboard Analytics tab shows charts (status, services, daily, districts, user growth)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug - /api/handymen/{user_id} was catching /api/handymen/nearby requests. Moved nearby endpoint before the path parameter route.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Moved /api/handymen/nearby endpoint before /api/handymen/{user_id} to fix route matching
/app/backend/tests/test_new_features_v10.py - Created comprehensive tests for nearby, CSV import, and analytics features
seed_data_creation: Test CSV import created 1 test handyman with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features tested and working: 1) Nearby districts/handymen endpoints use Haversine formula for distance calculation. DISTRICT_COORDS contains lat/lng for all 25 Sri Lankan districts. 2) CSV import endpoint at POST /api/admin/csv-import accepts multipart/form-data with 'file' field. Required columns: full_name, email. Optional: phone, password, district, services, description, experience_years. 3) Analytics endpoint at GET /api/admin/analytics returns MongoDB aggregation results for bookings_by_status, bookings_daily, top_services, top_handymen, user_growth, bookings_by_district, revenue_summary, and totals. All admin endpoints require admin role authentication.

bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - /api/handymen/{user_id} was defined before /api/handymen/nearby, so 'nearby' was being matched as a user_id parameter
bug_fixed.fix: Moved /api/handymen/nearby endpoint definition before /api/handymen/{user_id} in server.py
bug_fixed.verification: All nearby endpoint tests now pass

mocked_api_status.payhere: POST /api/payments/payhere-checkout returns 503 (not configured) - PAYHERE_MERCHANT_ID and PAYHERE_MERCHANT_SECRET not set in .env
